mnemonics.title: Eulerian Circuit Conditions
mnemonics.content: Even Steven: All vertices have EVEN degree for an Eulerian circuit. Two Oddballs: Exactly TWO vertices have ODD degree for an Eulerian path.

mnemonics.title: Path Types
mnemonics.content: WTP: Walk (any sequence), Trail (no repeated edges), Path (no repeated vertices). Remember the order: W → T → P with increasing restrictions.
